settings.description: higher_reflective ImageSat =~ Image + Satisfaction; from test-cbsem-higher-order.R single-HOC case

lavaanModel:
# Latent Variable Definitions
Image =~ IMAG1 + IMAG2 + IMAG3 + IMAG4 + IMAG5
Satisfaction =~ CUSA1 + CUSA2 + CUSA3
ImageSat =~ Image + Satisfaction
Expectation =~ CUEX1 + CUEX2 + CUEX3
Loyalty =~ CUSL1 + CUSL2 + CUSL3

# Regressions
Loyalty ~ ImageSat + Satisfaction + Expectation
